name: OpenKnowledge
description: Runs an AI-native Markdown editor and wiki with built-in MCP server, skills, and agentic search. Connects to Claude, Codex, and Cursor for knowledge-base editing. Open source by Inkeep.

skills.name: Agentic Search
skills.description: Runs agent-driven semantic search across a Markdown knowledge base to surface and cite relevant passages.

skills.name: Built-in MCP Server
skills.description: Exposes the knowledge base to Claude, Codex, and Cursor through a bundled MCP server with no extra setup.

skills.name: Markdown Wiki
skills.description: Edits and links Markdown documents as an AI-native wiki with skills that automate writing and organization.
